title: Steve's Carts Reborn
description: Continuation of the original custom minecart mod
body:
Continuation of  Vswe's Steves Carts 2 mod.


Steve's Carts Reborn allows for the player to customize and design minecarts that can be used for automation.


Full credit goes to Vswe for the original Steve's Carts mod.


We have a discord server you can join to talk about the mod, and ask for support.


In 1.11.2 and up the mod requires Reborn Core


Please report any issues you find to the github, they cannot be fixed if we don't know about them!
